product_overview: A Next.js-based HRIS Performance Management frontend for creating and managing KPI plans, tracking achievements, bulk importing users, and administering periods, scoring, and audit logs with role-based access control.
core_goals: Allow employees, managers, and admins to create, submit, approve, and track KPI plans and achievements
Provide admin capabilities for user CRUD, bulk user import, period management, scoring configuration, and system audit visibility
Support asynchronous bulk import and report exports with job status tracking
Ensure role-based UI and API access with clear validation and error feedback

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users with email/password and provide a first-time admin seed option; store JWT and redirect to the dashboard on success.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field (default pre-filled with admin@hris.com) -> Fill password input field (default pre-filled with admin123) -> Click Sign In button to submit login form -> Receive JWT and redirect to /dashboard -> See dashboard overview
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign In button to submit login form -> See error message on invalid credentials

Navigate to /login -> Click "First time? Click to seed admin user" -> Trigger POST /api/v1/auth/seed -> See success feedback that admin was seeded -> Fill seeded admin credentials -> Click Sign In button to submit login form -> Redirect to /dashboard

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Post-login landing showing key stats, quick actions, navigation, theme toggle, and logout.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View total employees, KPI plans count, and bulk jobs count -> Click quick action card for KPI to navigate to /dashboard/kpi -> See KPI plan management page
Navigate to /dashboard -> Use sidebar navigation to switch to /dashboard/achievements -> See achievements page
Navigate to /dashboard with no valid token in localStorage -> See redirect to /login
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click logout button -> Clear token and redirect to /login

features.name: KPI Plan Management
features.description: Create, edit, submit, approve, reject, view, and delete KPI plans with period filtering and expandable plan details.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/kpi -> Select a period from the period selector dropdown -> Click Create KPI Plan button to open the creation form -> Click Add KPI detail row -> Fill KPI title field -> Fill KPI definition field -> Select KPI polarity -> Fill KPI weight field -> Fill KPI target value field -> Fill KPI unit field -> Click Submit the KPI plan form -> See new plan listed as DRAFT or SUBMITTED depending on action
Navigate to /dashboard/kpi -> Select a period from the period selector dropdown -> Click Submit on a DRAFT plan -> Trigger POST /api/v1/kpi/plans/:id/submit -> See plan status update to SUBMITTED
Navigate to /dashboard/kpi as manager -> Find a SUBMITTED plan -> Click Approve on the plan -> Trigger POST /api/v1/kpi/plans/:id/approve -> See plan status update to APPROVED

Navigate to /dashboard/kpi as manager -> Find a SUBMITTED plan -> Click Reject on the plan -> Enter rejection comment -> Click Confirm Reject -> Trigger POST /api/v1/kpi/plans/:id/reject -> See plan status update to REJECTED and comment visible in plan details
Navigate to /dashboard/kpi -> Click Delete All -> Confirm deletion -> Trigger DELETE /api/v1/kpi/plans/all -> See no KPI plans listed

Navigate to /dashboard/kpi -> Click Create KPI Plan button to open creation form -> Leave required KPI title blank -> Click Submit the KPI plan form -> See validation error message for the missing title

features.name: Achievement Tracking
features.description: Enter actual values, evidence, and manager comments for KPI details and view real-time calculated scores and achievement percentages.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/achievements -> Select a KPI plan from the list -> For each KPI detail enter actual value -> Enter evidence URL for the KPI detail -> Click Save to update achievement data -> See auto-calculated achievement percentage and score for the plan
Navigate to /dashboard/achievements -> Select an approved KPI plan -> Add manager comment to a KPI detail -> Click Save -> See comment persisted in the detail
Navigate to /dashboard/achievements -> Select a KPI plan -> Enter an invalid evidence URL format -> Click Save -> See validation error for the evidence URL

features.name: User Management
features.description: Admin-only user listing, creation, editing, searching, filtering by department, and password reset functionality.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/users -> View paginated user list with search and department filtering -> Click Add User button to open creation modal -> Fill employee ID field -> Fill full name field -> Fill email field -> Select department field -> Select role field -> Select manager field -> Click Save -> Trigger POST /api/v1/users -> See new user appear in the list
Navigate to /dashboard/users -> Find a user in the list -> Click Edit button -> Modify fields -> Click Save -> Trigger PUT /api/v1/users/:id -> See updated user details in the list
Navigate to /dashboard/users -> Find a user in the list -> Click Reset Password button -> Fill new password -> Click Confirm -> Trigger POST /api/v1/auth/password/reset -> See success confirmation
Navigate to /dashboard/users as non-admin -> Observe Add/Edit/Reset Password controls hidden or disabled -> See access-restricted UI
Navigate to /dashboard/users -> Click Add User button -> Leave required email field blank -> Click Save -> See validation error for required email

features.name: Bulk User Import
features.description: Drag-and-drop or browse Excel uploads to create async bulk import jobs with template download and job/error-log tracking.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/bulk-upload -> Click Download Template -> Trigger GET /api/v1/admin/users/template -> Receive template file download

Navigate to /dashboard/bulk-upload -> Drag and drop an Excel file into the upload zone -> Trigger POST /api/v1/admin/users/bulk -> See new import job listed as QUEUED -> View import job status change to PROCESSING then COMPLETED -> See summary of import results
Navigate to /dashboard/bulk-upload -> Click to browse and select an Excel file -> Trigger POST /api/v1/admin/users/bulk -> See new import job created and listed

Navigate to /dashboard/bulk-upload -> Upload a malformed Excel file -> See import job status change to FAILED -> Click Download Error Log -> Trigger GET /api/v1/admin/jobs/:jobId/error-log -> Download CSV of errors

features.name: Period Management
features.description: Create, edit, delete evaluation periods and trigger KPI report exports with job progress and download.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/periods -> View list of all periods with status badges -> Click Create Period to open creation modal -> Fill period name field -> Fill start date field -> Fill end date field -> Select cycle type -> Select status -> Click Save -> Trigger POST /api/v1/periods -> See new period in the list
Navigate to /dashboard/periods -> Select an existing period -> Click Edit -> Modify fields -> Click Save -> Trigger PUT /api/v1/periods/:id -> See updated period in the list
Navigate to /dashboard/periods -> Click Delete on a period -> Confirm delete -> Trigger DELETE /api/v1/periods/:id -> See period removed from list

Navigate to /dashboard/periods -> Click Export KPI Report on a period -> Trigger GET /api/v1/admin/reports/kpi-export -> See export job created -> Poll GET /api/v1/admin/reports/kpi-export/status/:jobId until completed -> Trigger GET /api/v1/admin/reports/kpi-export/download/:jobId -> Download exported report
Navigate to /dashboard/periods -> Click Create Period -> Enter end date that is before start date -> Click Save -> See validation error for invalid date range

features.name: Scoring Configuration
features.description: View and modify scoring cap multiplier and grade thresholds with validation and preview functionality.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/scoring-config -> View current scoring configuration with grade thresholds -> Modify cap multiplier value -> Modify grade A/B/C/D threshold values -> Click Save Configuration button -> Trigger PUT /api/v1/scoring-config -> See success confirmation and updated thresholds

Navigate to /dashboard/scoring-config -> Change thresholds to invalid values (e.g., overlapping or out of 0-100) -> Click Save Configuration button -> See validation errors for invalid threshold values
Navigate to /dashboard/scoring-config -> Enter sample scores in preview -> Click Preview -> See grade assignment preview for the sample scores

features.name: Audit Log
features.description: Browse system audit trail with filters by action, user, date range, and paginated results including IP and user agent details.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/audit-log -> View paginated audit log entries -> Click Next page -> See next page of audit entries

Navigate to /dashboard/audit-log -> Filter by action type -> Filter by user -> Set start date -> Set end date -> Click Search -> Trigger GET /api/v1/admin/audit-log with filters -> See filtered audit entries
Navigate to /dashboard/audit-log -> Set start date that is after end date -> Click Search -> See validation error for invalid date range
Navigate to /dashboard/audit-log -> Click Reset -> Clear action, user, and date filters -> See full unfiltered audit list

routes.description: Root redirect - checks localStorage for token, redirects to /dashboard or /login
User login page with email/password form and admin seed button
Dashboard overview with stats cards (employees, KPI plans, bulk jobs) and quick action links
KPI plan management - create, submit, approve, reject KPI plans with period filtering
Achievement tracking - enter actual values, evidence URLs, and manager comments for KPI details
User management - list, create, edit users and reset passwords (Admin only)
Bulk user import via Excel file upload with drag-and-drop, template download, and job status tracking
Period management - create, edit, delete evaluation periods and trigger KPI report exports
Scoring configuration - set cap multiplier and grade thresholds (A/B/C/D/E)
Audit log viewer with filtering by action, user, date range, and pagination

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials. Includes admin seed functionality for first-time setup.
user_interactions: Fill email input field (default pre-filled with admin@hris.com)
Fill password input field (default pre-filled with admin123)
Click Sign In button to submit login form
See error message on invalid credentials
Click "First time? Click to seed admin user" to seed default admin

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Landing page after login showing stats cards and quick action links
user_interactions: View total employees, KPI plans count, and bulk jobs count
Click quick action cards to navigate to KPI, Bulk Upload, or Achievements pages
Use sidebar navigation to switch between dashboard sections
Toggle between light and dark theme
Click logout button

features.name: KPI Plan Management
features.description: Create, view, submit, approve, and reject KPI plans with detailed targets
user_interactions: Select a period from the period selector dropdown
Click Create KPI Plan button to open the creation form
Add KPI detail rows with title, definition, polarity, weight, target value, and unit
Remove KPI detail rows
Submit the KPI plan form
Click Submit on a DRAFT plan to send for approval
Click Approve on a SUBMITTED plan (manager role)
Click Reject on a SUBMITTED plan with comment
Click Delete All to remove all KPI plans
View plan details in expandable rows

features.name: Achievement Tracking
features.description: Enter actual values and evidence for approved KPI plans, with real-time score calculation
user_interactions: Select a KPI plan from the list
Enter actual value for each KPI detail
Enter evidence URL for each KPI detail
Click Save to update achievement data
View auto-calculated achievement percentage and score
Add manager comments on KPI details

features.name: User Management
features.description: CRUD operations for managing employees, including create, edit, and password reset
user_interactions: View paginated user list with search and department filtering
Click Add User button to open creation modal
Fill in employee ID, full name, email, department, role, and manager fields
Click Edit button to modify existing user
Click Reset Password button to set a new password for a user
Search users by name or email
Filter users by department code

features.name: Bulk User Import
features.description: Upload Excel files to bulk import users with drag-and-drop support and job tracking
user_interactions: Drag and drop an Excel file into the upload zone
Click to browse and select an Excel file
Download the Excel template for bulk import
View import job status (queued, processing, completed, failed)
Download error log for failed jobs

features.name: Period Management
features.description: CRUD for evaluation periods with KPI report export functionality
user_interactions: View list of all periods with status badges
Click Create Period to open creation modal
Fill in period name, start date, end date, cycle type, and status
Click Edit to modify existing period
Click Delete to remove a period
Click Export KPI Report to trigger report generation for a period
View export job progress and download completed reports

features.name: Scoring Configuration
features.description: Configure scoring parameters including cap multiplier and grade thresholds
user_interactions: View current scoring configuration with grade thresholds
Modify cap multiplier value
Modify grade A/B/C/D threshold values
Click Save Configuration button
See validation errors for invalid threshold values
Preview grade assignment for sample scores

features.name: Audit Log
features.description: View system audit trail with filtering and pagination
user_interactions: View paginated audit log entries
Filter by action type
Filter by user
Filter by date range (start and end date)
Click Search to apply filters
Click Reset to clear filters
View audit log details including IP address and user agent
